prompt: Create a cinematic retro-futurist sci-fi horror portrait in vertical 3:4 format: a visibly pregnant young woman with short dark curly hair, pale skin, black cat-eye glasses, red lipstick, and an anxious distant expression lies flat on her back inside a narrow metallic medical pod or experimental chamber, viewed from above with symmetrical composition. She wears a glossy deep emerald green maternity dress with gathered fabric over the belly and a heavy textured brown tweed overcoat spread open around her body; add a small choker necklace and a chunky metallic cuff or device on one wrist. Her bare feet point toward the bottom edge, arms resting straight at her sides, fingers relaxed. Surround her with dense biomechanical machinery: two large angled CRT monitors and one smaller top-center CRT monitor, exactly 3 screens total, each displaying glowing green heartbeat or waveform lines with tiny unreadable diagnostic text; tangled pink, purple, red, and black cables fill both side walls; include two prominent blue ribbed coil cylinders, one on each side near her hands; add metal rails, rivets, sockets, tubes, brass fittings, exposed circuitry, and dark industrial panels. Lighting should be moody magenta and violet with green monitor glow on her face and dress, high detail, painterly photorealism, 1980s analog science-fiction atmosphere, claustrophobic laboratory set, dramatic contrast, sharp central focus, rich textures, no extra people, no readable brand names, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic retro-futurist sci-fi horror portrait in vertical 3:4 format: a visibly pregnant young woman with short dark curly hair, pale skin, black cat-eye glasses, red lipstick, and an anxious distant expression lies flat on her back inside a narrow metallic medical pod or experimental chamber, viewed from above with symmetrical composition. She wears a glossy deep emerald green maternity dress with gathered fabric over the belly and a heavy textured brown tweed overcoat spread open around her body; add a small choker necklace and a chunky metallic cuff or device on one wrist. Her bare feet point toward the bottom edge, arms resting straight at her sides, fingers relaxed. Surround her with dense biomechanical machinery: two large angled CRT monitors and one smaller top-center CRT monitor, exactly 3 screens total, each displaying glowing green heartbeat or waveform lines with tiny unreadable diagnostic text; tangled pink, purple, red, and black cables fill both side walls; include two prominent blue ribbed coil cylinders, one on each side near her hands; add metal rails, rivets, sockets, tubes, brass fittings, exposed circuitry, and dark industrial panels. Lighting should be moody magenta and violet with green monitor glow on her face and dress, high detail, painterly photorealism, 1980s analog science-fiction atmosphere, claustrophobic laboratory set, dramatic contrast, sharp central focus, rich textures, no extra people, no readable brand names, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张竖屏 3:4 比例的电影感复古未来主义科幻恐怖肖像：一位明显的孕妇 留着黑色短卷发、皮肤苍白、戴着黑色猫眼眼镜、涂着红唇、表情焦虑且神情恍惚的年轻女性 平躺在一个狭窄的金属医疗舱或实验室内，采用对称构图的俯视视角。她身穿一件光泽感十足的 祖母绿 孕妇裙，腹部布料褶皱，外罩一件厚重的棕色粗花呢大衣，大衣向两侧敞开；颈部佩戴一条细项链，手腕上戴着一个厚重的金属手环或装置。她赤脚指向画面底部，双臂自然垂放在身体两侧，手指放松。周围环绕着密集的生物机械装置：两个大型倾斜的 CRT 显示器和一个位于顶部中央的小型 CRT 显示器，总共 3 个屏幕，每个屏幕显示着发光的绿色心跳或波形线条，并带有细小且无法辨认的诊断文字；粉色、紫色、红色和黑色的线缆交织在一起，填满了两侧墙壁；两侧靠近她手部的位置各有一个显眼的蓝色罗纹线圈圆柱体；添加金属导轨、铆钉、插座、管道、黄铜配件、裸露的电路和深色工业面板。灯光应为忧郁的洋红色和紫色，显示器的绿光投射在她的脸部和裙子上，高细节，绘画般的写实风格，1980 年代模拟科幻氛围，幽闭的实验室场景，强烈的对比度，清晰的中心焦点，丰富的纹理，画面中没有其他人，没有可辨认的品牌名称，没有水印。
